title: Extraction Pipeline — YouTube, arXiv, PDF, EPUB Content Extraction + CLI

test_results.failed_reason: test_daemon_status_when_not_running — env-dependent, daemon IS running (PID 82245). Not a regression.
test_results.delta_from_session_29: +82 new extractor tests (from Session 29B baseline of 661 → Session 29 total of 870)

optional_not_installed: docling (Tier 2 PDF extraction — scanned PDFs with OCR)

A.title: octane/extractors/ Module — Core Models and Data Structures
A.description: SourceType enum (YOUTUBE/ARXIV/PDF/EPUB/WEB), TaskState enum (8 states), ChunkMetadata dataclass (page/chapter/section/timestamps/is_junk), TextChunk dataclass (text + metadata + reliability + auto word/char counts), ExtractedDocument dataclass (full document with source_type, raw_text, chunks, content_hash via SHA-256, reliability_score auto-populated from SOURCE_RELIABILITY table).

B.title: YouTube Extraction — Search, Transcript, Classifier
B.description: YouTube search via scrapetube (primary) with yt-dlp fallback. 3-tier transcript extraction: Tier 1 youtube-transcript-api v1.2+ instance API, Tier 2 yt-dlp subtitle extraction with VTT parsing and deduplication, Tier 3 placeholder for mlx-whisper. Music-vs-spoken classifier using title/channel patterns, category hints, and duration heuristics.

live_test_result.title: Stanford CS25: V2 I Introduction to Transformers w/ Andrej Karpathy

C.title: arXiv Extraction — Search and PDF Download
C.description: arXiv search via arxiv Python package. PDF download with caching to ~/.octane/cache/papers/. Sanitized filenames, duplicate-safe caching by arxiv_id + version.

live_test_result.title: Attention Is All You Need
live_test_result.authors: Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N. Gomez, Lukasz Kaiser, Illia Polosukhin

D.title: PDF + EPUB Extraction
D.description: PDF extraction using pymupdf4llm (Tier 1) with auto-routing: if chars/page < 50, routes to docling for scanned PDFs (Tier 2, optional). EPUB extraction using ebooklib + BeautifulSoup4 with chapter structure preservation. Quality param: fast (pymupdf only), deep (docling), auto (auto-detect).

E.title: Chunking Module — Source-Aware Strategies
E.description: Three chunking strategies: (1) chunk_text for PDF/arXiv using RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter with 2048 char chunks (~512 tokens), 200 char overlap, section-aware separators. (2) chunk_transcript_by_time for YouTube with 45-second windows. (3) chunk_epub_chapters with chapter-first then recursive split for large chapters.

F.title: Unified Pipeline + CLI
F.description: pipeline.py: async extract() entry point with detect_source_type() using regex for YouTube URLs, arXiv URLs/IDs, file extensions. Dispatches to _extract_youtube(), _extract_arxiv(), _extract_pdf(), _extract_epub() with run_in_executor for sync I/O. CLI: octane extract run <source>, octane extract search-youtube <query>, octane extract search-arxiv <query>. Options: --quality, --type, --chunks.

cli_commands.octane extract run <source>: Extract content from YouTube URL, arXiv ID, PDF path, or EPUB path
cli_commands.octane extract search-youtube <query>: Search YouTube and display results table
cli_commands.octane extract search-arxiv <query>: Search arXiv and display results table

G.title: Bug Fix — ExtractedDocument reliability_score sentinel
G.description: Fixed reliability_score default from 0.5 to -1.0 sentinel. The __post_init__ used 'not self.reliability_score' which treated explicit 0.0 (no-transcript case) as falsy and overwrote it with SOURCE_RELIABILITY base score. Changed to 'self.reliability_score < 0' check.

test_coverage.TestSourceReliability: All types scored, arXiv highest, web lowest, range 0-1
test_coverage.TestReliabilityModifiers: peer_reviewed positive, music negative, all bounded
test_coverage.TestTextChunk: Auto word/char counts, explicit counts preserved, empty text
test_coverage.TestExtractedDocument: Content hash auto, empty text no hash, reliability from type, total_words, total_chunks, to_dict
test_coverage.TestDetectSourceType: 4 YouTube URL formats, 5 arXiv patterns, PDF/EPUB/web fallback, whitespace stripping
test_coverage.TestClassifier: Music video, lecture, tutorial, podcast, remix, empty metadata, category hints, duration
test_coverage.TestVTTParsing: Basic 3-segment parse, deduplication, HTML tag stripping, position tag stripping, time conversion
test_coverage.TestChunkText: Short single chunk, long splits, reliability applied, arXiv separators
test_coverage.TestChunkTranscriptByTime: Basic ~45s chunking, empty, single segment, sequential indices, reliability
test_coverage.TestChunkEpubChapters: Small chapters, large chapter split, empty skipped, reliability, cross-chapter indices
test_coverage.TestPipelineExtractMocked: YouTube mocked, YouTube no-transcript, PDF mocked, unsupported type error
test_coverage.TestE2EExtraction: Live YouTube, live arXiv, live YouTube search, live arXiv search
